name: DOWN SYNDROME
definition: MONGOLISM = TRISOMY 21 positive lateral lumbar index (ratio of horizontal to vertical diameters of L2) "Mickey Mouse ears" / "elephant ears": measurement of space between spine and overlying skin on midsagittal view

demographics.Prevalence: 1÷870 live births, most common karyotype / chromosomal abnormality in USA

Axial skeleton: "squared vertebral bodies" = centra high and narrow
Chest: congenital heart disease (40%): endocardial cushion defect, VSD, tetralogy of Fallot
Pelvis (frontal view): flaring of iliac wings (= rotation of iliac wings toward coronal plane at sacroiliac joints)
flattening of acetabular roof (small acetabular angle)
Extremities: clinodactyly (50%); widened space between first two digits of hands + feet
